headline: CNBC Daily Open: Fresh Iran war worries halt stock rally
summary: Oil prices rise and markets fall after Netanyahu tells CNBC Israel and U.S. prepared to attack Iran again if necessary.

headline: The Oldest Name In Aerospace Just Became Wall Street's Newest Stock
summary: Applied Aerospace & Defense, with roots dating back to 1900, debuted on NYSE as AADX.

headline: Why Did AEVEX Stock Plunge 16%?
summary: The unmanned systems firm was flying high, but a plan to issue new stock and let insiders cash out sent shares into a nosedive.

headline: Union Pacific Railroad’s Newest Commemorative Locomotive No. 4547 Embarks on First Freight Mission Hauling Artemis III Rocket Parts
summary: CORINNE, Utah, June 03, 2026--Marking a milestone in innovation and collaboration, Union Pacific Railroad on Tuesday unveiled its newest commemorative locomotive with Northrop Grumman and Wabtec, as No. 4547 began its first mission hauling Space Launch System solid rocket motor segments for NASA’s Artemis III lunar exploration program.

headline: Northrop Grumman Backs Space Interceptor Push With Self Funded Test
summary: Northrop Grumman (NYSE:NOC) is partnering with Apex to advance space based interceptor technology for missile defense. The company is also independently funding a major on orbit demonstration for the U.S. Space Force, targeting a 2027 timeline. The initiative aligns with U.S. government goals to speed up the development and deployment of next generation space defense capabilities.
